rule: PM Agent MUST run bash tools/run_pm_orchestrator.sh at the start of every session. Exit non-zero blocks sprint work. Honor system is forbidden.

session_steps.description: Active phase and sprint config valid
Sprint board schema, deps, required fields
Issue pack matches board — create missing / carry-over
Design data and docs gates green on main
Compute next agent dispatch, stale, escalations

post_agent_steps.description: PM updates issue status after every agent session
Re-run dispatch before assigning next agent

other_agent_session_gate.rule: Architect, Builder, QA, Flow, Release, Visual agents MUST pass session gate before work
